raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX I received a call and a text from American Express XXXX Department XXXX that there was a suspected fraud attempt for {$4300.00} from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. I immediately advised that I did not authorize this company for any charges, I have never been a customer of this company and no one has authorization to use my card for any reason. Amex issued a new card an assured this charge would be removed from my account within XXXX days. today XX/XX/XXXX I contacted Amex as the charge is still remaining on my account ; they advised that the XXXX complaint was rejected and the charges were found to be valid. This is in no way possible - as i indicated I did not authorize any charges for this company. Additionally i did not even get a notification from Amex that they made a decsion on my investigation. This is outrageous that i have a XXXX charge on my account that i did not make. It is apparent that I have been a victim of fraud as evidenced by AMEX own notification on the date the charge was attempted as it was out of character for my spending habits.
